explanations.3: The backslash at the end of line 3 tells Docker to continue reading the next line as part of the same command, so all those packages get installed together instead of running separate install commands.
explanations.15: This command rebuilds the font cache so the operating system can find and use all the fonts we just installed.
explanations.19: We're creating a directory where Puppeteer (a tool that automates browser tasks) will store cached data, and making sure the node user has full read/write permissions to it.
explanations.22: This tells Puppeteer not to download its own copy of Chromium since we already installed it system-wide on line 4.
explanations.23: This environment variable points Puppeteer to the Chromium browser we installed, so it knows exactly where to find it when it needs to run.
